name: Digital360 S.p.A.
summary: Digital360 S.p.A. operates multi-channel B2B platform in Italy. The company offers digital marketing and sales engine, content management system, customer relationship management, marketing automation, and smart recommendation project services. It also operates DIGITAL360Hub, a portal for digital solution providers; BankingUp, an online portal for finance and Fintech companies; RetailUp, an online portal for retailing and distribution sectors; AutomotiveUp, an online portal for automotive sector; and SmartMobilityUp, an online portal for mobility market, as well as ZeroUno, ForumPA, ScegliFornitore, and CorCom portals. In addition, it provides advisory and coaching services in the areas of audit and compliance, IT governance and cyber security, people strategy and digital open innovation, legal, healthcare, MarTech, sports, and operations. Further, the company operates micro-learning platforms, such as 360 Digital School and FPA Digital School. It serves managers, professionals, policy makers, politicians, tech companies, startups, and public administrations. Digital360 S.p.A. is based in Milan, Italy.
